summary: The diff implements substantial portions of all four requirements. REQ-1 (PWA) is well covered with manifest.json, service worker, PWAInstallButton, IOSInstallModal, and pwaUtils. REQ-2 (dashboard) is covered with mobile bottom tab nav, asset detail cards, sparklines, capital flow, confluence zones, and bubble visualization surfaces. REQ-3 (real-time data) is covered with useBinanceData singleton, WebSocket + REST polling fallback, and connection status indicator. REQ-4 (dark theme) is covered with OKLCH CSS vars, neon colors, JetBrains Mono, and consistent dark backgrounds. A few specific acceptance criteria have gaps or cannot be confirmed from the truncated diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: On screens wider than 1024px, a sidebar or multi-column layout is used (REQ-2 AC). The diff shows desktop header nav and lg: breakpoints in the grid, but no explicit sidebar layout for desktop is visible.
missing_requirements.reason: App.tsx and surface files show bottom tab nav hidden on lg+, but no sidebar component or multi-column page layout such as sidebar plus main content is shown for desktop. The grid inside BubbleVisualizationTabSurface goes to xl:grid-cols-4 but that is an asset card grid, not a page-level sidebar layout.

missing_requirements.requirement: Live prices and 24h change percentages visible on the main screen without scrolling on mobile (REQ-2 AC).
missing_requirements.reason: The LivePriceTicker uses overflow-x-auto with min-w-max, meaning users must scroll horizontally to see all tickers. The requirement specifies prices visible without scrolling.

hallucinated_features.description: PWA update toast notification via usePWAUpdateToast hook that polls for service worker updates every 5 minutes and shows a toast with an Update action button.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention a PWA update notification or update toast. This is an extra feature not in any requirement or acceptance criterion.

hallucinated_features.description: App shortcuts in manifest.json for Mercado and Fluxo de Capital with URL parameters.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention app shortcuts as a requirement. This is an extra manifest feature beyond what was specified.

hallucinated_features.description: PWA screenshots in manifest.json with mobile 720x1280 and desktop 1280x720 form_factor entries.
hallucinated_features.reason: Screenshots in the manifest were not requested in any requirement or acceptance criterion.
